_doc: Maps each scraper product (output_shopify_clean/<cat>/<handle>/info.json) to its owner-licensed image source folder under catalog/. Image filter is a case-insensitive substring matched against the filename in the catalog folder. _orphans lists items with no counterpart on the other side.

products.title_de: KONRAD Ventilheizkörper Typ 22
products.notes: KONRAD is a commodity series with no owner shoot — folder catalog/Typ 22/ contains Platis photos (Atlas series), reassigned to atlas-typ-22 product.

products.title_de: KONRAD Ventilheizkörper Typ 33
products.notes: No catalog/ folder for Typ 33 — owner only photographed Typ 22. Reuse Typ 22 photos OR omit until shoot.

_orphan_catalog_folders.reason: Scraper has 'handtuchheizkorper-seitenanschluss-alpha-weiss' (white only). Folder may also have anthrazit/schwarz photos for non-scraped variants.
No scraper match — owner-exclusive premium variant. Needs manual product entry.
No scraper match — owner-exclusive premium electric variant. Needs manual product entry.
No scraper match — only Typ 22 and Typ 33 in scraper. Owner has Typ 20 photography → either we add a manual KONRAD Typ 20 product or rename folder.
Lifestyle/in-room shoot. Use as supplementary 'in context' images for the same series (BANYO=bath, SALON=living-room) — not a primary product.

_summary.decision_required: Confirm policy for scraper orphans (omit / reuse generic / scraper CDN with attribution) and catalog orphans (manual product entries needed for Multiblock, Premium Elanor, Premium Elanor Elektrisch, Typ 20). Note: orphan list updated v2 — KONRAD Typ 22 added (no owner shoot, Typ 22 folder reassigned to Atlas), Atlas removed (now matched).
